titleStmt.title: SII 16.286: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 286. (A.R. No. 162 of 1917.) ŚĒKŪRU, GUNTUR TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar lying near the Vēṇugōpālasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 14[9]6, Bhāva, Māgha śu. 11, Thursday corresponding to 1575 A.D., January 22, Saturday, not Thursday.

It registers the grant of a piece of land in the village Śēkūru in Kōṇḍavīṭi-sīma, held by Mahāmaṇḍalēsvara Rāmarāju Jagarājayya, by Kottapalli Veṅkaṭaya of Bhāradvāja-gōtra, Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Yajuś-s11ākhā for worship and services on the Suvarṇōtsava-paurṇamī festivals to the god Tiruveṅkaṭēśvara at Saṅgamasthāna. The gift land is said to have formed a portion of his own lands in Śēkūru which the donor obtained from Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jagarājayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakavaruṣaṁbu
lu 1496 Agunēṭi bhāva
saṁvatsara māgha śu 11 gu
śrīsaṁggamasthāna nivāsulaina
śrī tiruveṁkkaṭēśvarulaku śrīma
drājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra śrīraṁggarā
yadēva mahārāyaluṁgāru
pṛthvīsāṁbrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍḍagānu

bhāradvājagōtra Āpastaṁbhasūtra
yajuśśākhādhyāyulaina krotta pa
lli Ōbhaḷayyaṁgāri pautṛluṁ
nnu tirumalayaṁgāri putṛlaIna
veṁkaṭaya daṁḍaṁ samarpiṁci [Icci*]na
bhūdāna dharmaśāsanamu śrīmmana
hāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju
jagarājayadēva mahārājulu
ṁgāru tamaku sāgivacina ko
ṁḍḍavīṭiśīmalōni sēkūri grā
māna māku saptanadīsaṁggamama

ṁdunu māku dhāravōśina kēsari
pāṭini yēṁdumukṣētraṁ grā
mānaku tūrpupolāna vī
ra jaṁnayya viṁjaṁ pōtayya
ṁgāru duṁnnina ciṁttala vutta
rapu cēlunnu karavaḍi koṁḍḍayya
duṁnnina yēṭimiṭṭa cēnuṁnnu ve
raśi staḷālu 3ki kēsaripāṭni yi
ddhumukṣētraṁ svāmi suvarnnō
tsava . puUrnamināṭi pūjye śāva
ku samarpistimi Ācaṁdrastā

yigānu śrīveṁkkaṭēśvarulu pūjya
śāva Ādhariṁccaṁgalavāṁḍu
yēka Iva bhaginī lōkē sarvēṣāmē
va bhūbhujāṁ . na bhōjyā na karagrāṁ
hyā dēvadattā vasuṁdharā .
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ para
dattā
Digital edition of SII 16.286 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
